integrityChip.intact: hash chain intact · {template} · {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}
integrityChip.broken: hash chain check failed · {template} · {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

marketing.headline: Trustworthy AI bookkeeping for Sweden-first teams.
marketing.subheadline: Compliance-critical flows stay deterministic. AI guides, cites, and accelerates the review surface.
marketing.demoNotice: Demo mode is intentionally using local scaffold behavior so it is never mistaken for live accounting.

captureLane.description: Camera, paste, upload, and share land in the same queue and show where the draft was stored.

innovation.description: Voice capture, simulations, and close copilot are isolated from posting authority until they earn trust.

shell.demoBanner: Demo mode is active. Local demo data and local AI fallback are enabled intentionally.

captureSheet.title: Add business evidence
captureSheet.description: Capture starts locally first so the UI stays responsive. The result tells you whether the draft was stored persistently or only for this tab.
captureSheet.pasteHint: Paste works on the Capture page — press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) there to capture a copied image.
captureSheet.shareHint: Use your device's share menu and pick JPX Accounting to send evidence here.

camera.label: Camera
camera.hint: Snap a receipt with the device camera

upload.label: Upload
upload.hint: Pick a PDF or image from disk

share.label: Share
share.hint: Receive from another app via PWA share

captureStatus.session: {mode} draft saved for this browser tab only.
captureStatus.memory: {mode} draft saved in temporary memory for this tab only.
captureStatus.error: {mode} draft could not be saved locally. Check browser storage permissions and try again.

today.title: Review-ready bookkeeping, shaped for the phone first.
today.description: Evidence arrives once, suggestions stay explainable, and the queue keeps the real accounting work above the fold instead of hiding it under dashboard chrome.
today.queueTitle: Keep the next accounting decision obvious.
today.queueDescription: Cards stay compact on mobile, expand on larger screens, and keep AI reasoning behind secondary disclosure until it is needed.

editSheet.title: Edit before approval
editSheet.description: Correct the account, VAT code, or amounts — approving posts the corrected lines.
editSheet.amountError: Net + VAT must equal gross (within 0.01); all three amounts are required when any of them changes.
editSheet.submitError: The edited approval could not be completed.
editSheet.appendOnlyNote: Approving posts new ledger lines with your corrections — the original evidence, suggestion, and event history stay append-only and are never rewritten.

card.suggestionsOff: AI suggestions are turned off for this workspace under AI posture. The evidence, rule hits, and every review action below keep working — decide manually.

evidence.description: Immutable file record, hash chain, and provenance.

notFound.title: Evidence not found
notFound.message: This evidence id is not present in the current workspace snapshot.

preview.title: Preview
preview.unavailable: No preview is available on this device.
preview.unavailableHint: The file was captured on another device or the storage backend does not serve previews.

fields.title: Extracted fields
fields.empty: No extracted fields yet — run extraction to populate them.

links.title: Review
links.extractLocked: This voucher is already decided — extraction stays locked so the ledger remains append-only.
links.noVoucher: No voucher is linked to this evidence yet.

shared.draftSaved: Shared content saved as a draft.
shared.promoted: {count, plural, one {Shared file promoted to ledger evidence.} other {# shared files promoted to ledger evidence.}}
shared.pendingBanner: {count, plural, one {One shared file} other {# shared files}} could not be staged into evidence. Add {count, plural, one {it} other {them}} again from Quick add.

capture.title: Add evidence, see drafts, browse the archive.
capture.description: The single home for everything you've captured — drafts in progress, freshly uploaded, fully archived.

quickAdd.title: Quick add
quickAdd.description: Each tile creates a local draft you can promote into ledger evidence.

camera.label: Camera
camera.hint: Snap a receipt with the device camera

upload.label: Upload
upload.hint: Pick a PDF or image from disk

share.label: Share
share.hint: Receive from another app via PWA share

quickAdd.pasteEmpty: No image found in the clipboard.
quickAdd.pasteUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable here — press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) on this page instead.
quickAdd.shareHint: Open your device's share menu and choose JPX Accounting to send files here.

sieResult.imported: Imported {vouchers} vouchers from the SIE file.
sieResult.importedWithSkipped: Imported {vouchers} vouchers from the SIE file — {skipped} skipped.
sieResult.error: Could not import the SIE file.

dropzone.aria: Add evidence files by browsing or dropping them here
dropzone.title: Drop receipts or invoices here
dropzone.hint: Images and PDFs up to 16 MB — click, press Enter, or drag files in.

promotion.promoteError: Could not promote {name}. Retry from the drafts table.
promotion.rejectedType: {name} was skipped — only images and PDFs are supported.
promotion.rejectedSize: {name} was skipped — files must be 16 MB or smaller.

drafts.title: Drafts in progress
drafts.empty: No local drafts. Use Quick add above or the capture button.

archive.title: Evidence archive
archive.empty: No archived evidence yet. Promote a draft above to populate the archive.

books.title: The ledger, drillable.
books.description: Journal, general ledger, trial balance, suppliers, and close — all scoped to a period.

journal.emptyForSupplier: No journal entries for {supplier} in this period.
journal.empty: No journal entries in this period.

generalLedger.emptyForAccount: No ledger entries for account {account} in this period.
generalLedger.empty: No ledger entries in this period.

trialBalance.title: Trial balance
trialBalance.empty: No balances yet. Post a voucher to populate the trial balance.

suppliers.empty: No suppliers yet. Vouchers with a supplier name appear here.

close.readOnly: Close runs are read-only in this build.
close.copilotTitle: Month-end stays visible while the queue moves.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Every number on this screen renders from one report pack per period — prose, KPIs, and statements can never drift apart.

export.hint: Downloads the workspace SIE file from the API.

unavailable.title: Reports unavailable
unavailable.message: Reports could not be loaded. Check the runtime configuration and API availability.

narrative.title: This period in words
narrative.computedFrom: Computed from your ledger — every number above matches the statements below.
narrative.empty: Nothing has been booked in this period yet.
narrative.periodResultWithDelta: The period closed at <value></value>, <delta></delta> versus the previous period.
narrative.biggestMover: Biggest cost mover: {accountNumber} {accountName} at <value></value> (<delta></delta> vs previous period).
narrative.cashDelta: Cash went from <opening></opening> to <closing></closing>, a change of <delta></delta>.
narrative.vatToRefund: Net VAT position (box 49): <value></value> to get back.

vat.title: VAT return
vat.description: Momsdeklaration boxes computed over the selected period.

taxTimeline.title: Statutory tax timeline
taxTimeline.description: Upcoming Skatteverket and Bolagsverket deadlines for this workspace's VAT period and fiscal year. Only VAT deadlines carry an amount — the others are date-only on purpose.
taxTimeline.empty: No statutory deadlines in the next 120 days.

alerts.label: Compliance watch
alerts.title: Deadlines and regulatory signals
alerts.description: Pulled from the same compliance feed as the inbox notifications surface.

monthly.title: Cash in / out per month
monthly.aria: Bar chart of monthly cash in and cash out

cashBridge.title: Cash bridge
cashBridge.aria: Waterfall chart of the period's cash movement drivers

drill.title: Account {account}
drill.empty: No lines for this account in the period.

picker.title: Dashboard widgets
picker.description: Choose which widgets are shown. Hidden widgets keep their place and data — nothing is deleted.

header.title: Your finances at a glance.
header.description: Nine widgets over the same numbers the reports print — drag to arrange, and every figure drills down to its source.

dashboard.emptyCanvas: All widgets are hidden. Use Customize to bring them back.

cash-position.title: Cash position
cash-position.noHistory: Not enough history for a runway estimate yet.

review-queue.title: Review queue
review-queue.pending: {count, plural, one {# pending review} other {# pending reviews}}
review-queue.empty: The queue is clear — nothing waiting for review.
review-queue.batchTitle: Approve {count, plural, one {# high-confidence review} other {# high-confidence reviews}}?
review-queue.batchDescription: Each review is approved one by one through the ordinary review gate — you remain the decision maker for every posting.
review-queue.batchDone: {count, plural, one {# review approved.} other {# reviews approved.}}

tax-timeline.title: Tax deadlines
tax-timeline.empty: No statutory deadlines in the next 120 days.

vat-status.title: VAT status
vat-status.setAside: Set this aside for Skatteverket until the return is due.

integrity.title: Ledger integrity
integrity.brokenHint: The event chain did not verify — the log may have been altered. Investigate before trusting reports.

cashRunway.positive: Cash is growing — {cash, number} in the bank with about {monthlyNet, number} added per month.
cashRunway.burning: About {runwayMonths, number} months of runway — {cash, number} in cash at a burn of {monthlyBurn, number} per month.

expenseAnomaly.spike: {account} {accountName} is at {amount, number} this month — typically around {typicalAmount, number}.

vatSetAside.setAside: Set aside {amount, number} for VAT in {periodLabel}.

deadlineProximity.due: Statutory deadline on {dueDate} — {daysUntil, plural, =0 {due today} one {# day left} other {# days left}}.

missingEvidence.count: {count, plural, one {# voucher is missing evidence} other {# vouchers are missing evidence}} — Bokföringslagen wants a verification behind every posting.

supplierSpike.spike: {supplier} is at {amount, number} this month — typically around {typicalAmount, number}.

advisor.title: Ask AI about your numbers
advisor.description: The advisor explains, cites Swedish sources, and drafts review actions — but it never posts anything. Every proposal waits for your explicit approval in the review gate.

article50.statement: You are chatting with an AI system (EU AI Act, Article 50). Answers are AI-generated and grounded in your report pack; any action the advisor proposes executes only after your explicit approval through the ordinary review queue.

advisor.emptyState: Ask about your cash position, VAT, deadlines, or the review queue. Answers cite their sources, and proposals always wait for your approval.

input.label: Ask a grounded question
input.placeholder: How is our cash position right now?
input.hint: The advisor cites Swedish sources and proposes actions — nothing is posted without your explicit approval.

threads.title: Conversations
threads.subtitle: Stored locally in this browser.
threads.empty: Ask a question to start your first conversation on this device.

approval.awaiting: Draft by AI — awaiting your approval
approval.gateNote: Approving executes the ordinary review decision — the review gate stays the only path to a posted voucher.
approval.respondedApproved: Approval sent — the advisor is confirming…
approval.respondedRejected: Rejection sent — the advisor is confirming…

tool.deniedRow: The proposal was rejected — the item stays in the review queue for your manual decision.

error.fallback: The advisor request could not be completed.

disabled.title: The AI advisor is turned off
disabled.message: This workspace has the advisor disabled under AI posture. Bookkeeping, capture, and the review queue keep working without it — no AI runs in the background.

prompts.cashRunway: How is our cash position and runway?
prompts.expenseAnomaly: Why are costs unusually high this month?
prompts.vatSetAside: How much VAT should we set aside?
prompts.deadlineProximity: Which statutory deadlines are coming up?
prompts.supplierSpike: Which supplier costs spiked this month?
prompts.cashPosition: How is our cash position right now?
prompts.vatDeadline: When is our next VAT return due?
prompts.representationRules: What are the rules for deducting representation?

about.label: About this AI
about.title: What runs here, and under whose authority

providers.local-demo: Local demo runtime (deterministic, no external AI service)
providers.unavailable: Unavailable — no AI provider is configured

about.approvalStatement: The AI suggests and drafts — it never posts. Every AI proposal becomes a ledger entry only after your explicit approval in the review queue.
about.unavailable: Runtime information could not be loaded.

aiPosture.article50: Transparency notice (EU AI Act, Article 50): you are always told when you interact with an AI system here, and AI-generated content is labeled as such.

advisor.title: AI advisor chat
advisor.description: The grounded advisor on the Advisor screen. Turning it off hides the chat — bookkeeping, capture, and the review queue keep working without it.

suggestions.title: AI suggestions in the review queue
suggestions.description: Confidence bands, suggested accounts, and AI reasoning on review cards and widgets. Turning them off keeps every human review action fully operable.

aiPosture.needsCompany: Save your company settings first — the AI posture is stored with them.
aiPosture.saveError: Could not save the AI posture.
